title: diplazium angustisquamatum
intro: Diplazium angustisquamatum, also known as the narrow-scaled Diplazium, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to various regions in Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Diplazium angustisquamatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as promoting wound healing and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its dried rhizomes can also be powdered for use in topical applications.
